title: Customers
exportTooltip: Columns: active_in_portal matches the green Active badge (service connected, not terminated). commission_wizard_completed is True only after the commissioning wizard runs.
moveToColdStorage_one: Move {{count}} customer record to cold storage? They can be restored within 30 days before permanent deletion.
moveToColdStorage_other: Move {{count}} customer records to cold storage? They can be restored within 30 days before permanent deletion.
restoreFromColdStorage_one: Restore {{count}} customer record from cold storage? They will reappear in the active customer list.
restoreFromColdStorage_other: Restore {{count}} customer records from cold storage? They will reappear in the active customer list.
alertMoveFailed_one: {{failed}} of {{total}} record failed to move to cold storage.
alertMoveFailed_other: {{failed}} of {{total}} records failed to move to cold storage.
bannerColdStorage: These records were deleted and will be permanently purged after 30 days. Select records and click Restore to move them back to the active list.
